arts.ttl: Chris Davies gives Christoph Klarer injury update before Birmingham City battle Charlton
arts.sum: Chris Davies gives Christoph Klarer injury update before Birmingham City battle Charlton On Gardner-Hickman, Davies commented: “He’s getting there.

arts.ttl: Nathan Jones makes Birmingham City admission after refuelling Alfie May fire
arts.sum: Charlton are one of two sides to defeat Blues in League One this season and have taken 16 points from their last six matches to move into the play-off places. Nathan Jones brings his in-form Charlton side to St Andrew's this weekend to take on League One leaders Birmingham City

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic receive selection boost ahead of Birmingham City trip
arts.sum: Charlton Athletic boss Nathan Jones has said Thierry Small has fully ‘recovered’ following Emmanuel Fernandez’s tackle last time… The post Charlton Athletic receive selection boost ahead of Birmingham City trip appeared first on The72 - Football League News.

arts.ttl: Nathan Jones delivers assessment on his first 12 months in charge of Charlton Athletic
arts.sum: “The progress has been very realistic – both for a club of our stature and size but also where we came from,” Jones told the South London Press . “The club and the team are in a really good position considering we’ve had a lot of new signings and that when we came in we were just outside the relegation zone.

arts.ttl: Preview: Birmingham City vs. Charlton Athletic - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's League One clash between Birmingham City and Charlton Athletic, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Birmingham City could be without five players for crucial Charlton clash
arts.sum: Leonard will be unavailable whilst the gash in his knee heals, but Gardner-Hickman and Hansson aren't far away according to manager Chris Davies. Blues are already without Marc Leonard, Taylor Gardner-Hickman and Emil Hansson.

arts.ttl: Charlton Athletic boss Jones on challenge of facing League One leaders Birmingham
arts.sum: They’re the best side in the league and it will be the toughest game. Nathan Jones says his Charlton Athletic side will be facing the toughest test of their League One campaign on Saturday when they head to Birmingham City.

arts.ttl: What Chris Davies told Luke Harris as Birmingham City deliver perfect response
arts.sum: Birmingham City hammered Cambridge United 4-0 to record their biggest victory of the League One season on Tuesday night and pull clear in the promotion race. Blues have now won 20 games in League One this season which equals their league wins tally from 2011/12 when the club finished fourth in the Championship under Chris Hughton.

arts.ttl: Charlton boss asked if Championship status required to re-sign Thierry Small on new contract
arts.sum: Charlton Athletic manager Nathan Jones has responded to a question about Thierry Small’s future – and whether promotion to the Championship is needed for the former Everton and Southampton player to re-sign. Charlton wanted Small to pen a longer-term contract but activated a clause to extend his stay for the 2024-25 League One campaign.
